---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the PVE Nimble Storage plugin
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the PVE Nimble Storage plugin
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem or use case

A short description of the problem you’re trying to solve or the use case you want to support (e.g. “I want to … so that …”).

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or enhancement you’d like. Be as specific as you can (e.g. new storage option, change in behavior, new capability).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you’ve thought about.

## Additional context

- How you use the plugin today (single node, cluster, multipath, auto_iscsi_discovery, etc.)
- Any constraints (Nimble version, Proxmox version, network layout)
- Links to docs or prior discussion if relevant
